description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage, painted primarily white with a bold red tail fin and engine nacelles. The livery features the Qantas logo and a commemorative '100' marking, indicating a special edition or anniversary design. The wings are long, swept back, and equipped with upward-curved winglets at the tips, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. Two large turbofan engines are mounted under the wings, and the tail section has a conventional vertical stabilizer with a red and white kangaroo motif. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible along the sides for passengers. The landing gear is not visible in these views, suggesting it is retracted.
description: A sleek, white and red Qantas commercial airplane with swept-back wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a distinctive kangaroo logo on the tail. The fuselage features a special '100' anniversary marking and multiple passenger windows.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full Qantas livery, '100' marking, and the red tail with kangaroo logo; both engines and the full length of the fuselage are visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wingspan, upward-curved winglets, and the red accent on the nose and tail; the engines are partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile with the Qantas logo and '100' marking mirrored; both engines and the full fuselage are visible, with the tail logo prominent.
description_view_3: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, and the wide, swept-back wings with visible engines beneath; the symmetry of the design is apparent.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, long swept-back wings with upward-curved winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle (not visible, inferred from typical configuration and absence in images)
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
